content:
# Polyelectrolytes

**Summary**: Polymers that contain ionizable groups and can be used to modify the surface properties of materials.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] used polyelectrolytes (PDADMAC and PSS) to coat fly ash for improved cadmium removal.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] Polyelectrolytes are used to modify the surface properties of adsorbents to enhance their capacity for heavy metals.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] Layer-by-layer (LBL) deposition.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Polyelectrolytes... are also used as additives to modify the physical properties of aqueous solutions. ([[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017, p. 27]])
